question: How do you ask 'Where is the bathroom?' in Bulgarian?
correctAnswer: {{bg-BG|Къде е тоалетната?|Kade e toaletnata?|KA-de E toa-let-NA-ta?}}
incorrectAnswers: {{bg-BG|Колко струва това?|Kolko struva tova?|KOL-ko STRU-va TO-va?}}
{{bg-BG|Едно кафе, моля.|Edno kafe, molya.|ED-no KA-fe, MO-lya.}}
{{bg-BG|Сметката, моля.|Smetkata, molya.|smet-KA-ta, MO-lya.}}
explanation: A common bulgarian phrase for beginner and travel use.
